prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. Four distinct isometric sections arranged horizontally from left to right, each representing a Substitution Mode for AI-managed household purchases. SECTION 1 — EXACT (Blue #6C82FE dominant, lock icon): A single product package (yogurt container) glows brightly in Blue and White, sitting on a small isometric pedestal. All surrounding products are grayed out and faded. A lock icon floats above. The message is 'only this one, nothing else.' Clean and restrictive. SECTION 2 — FLEXIBLE (Orange #F59400 dominant, circular arrows icon): Three to four similar product packages on small isometric shelves, connected by Orange flowing arc lines showing interchangeability. Small numbered badges (1, 2, 3) indicate priority ranking. The message is 'any of these will do, in this order.' SECTION 3 — EXPLORING (Pink #FC6978 dominant, magnifying glass icon): Multiple product cards scattered in an isometric array. Some cards have a checkmark (White on Blue), others have an X mark (White on Pink). A magnifying glass icon floats above. The visual shows an active learning process — testing and evaluating. SECTION 4 — SURPRISE (Orange #F59400 and Pink #FC6978 gradient feel, dice icon): A mystery box (White with Orange and Pink accents) with a new product emerging upward. Above the box, a small filter bar shows condition icons (crunchy texture, 'not too sweet' crossed-out candy). Discovery within constraints. Between sections, thin directional arrows show mode transitions (e.g., Exploring → Exact). A matte black silhouette hand at the far left touches the Exact section. All forms: clean uniform-weight matte black #111111 outlines. Soft-cell shading. Expansive Light Gray #EEEEEE background. Maximum airiness between sections.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, chess pieces, coins, cryptocurrency, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D photorealism, realistic products, brand logos, actual food photos
